## Summary

*What does this pull request add or change?*

---

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New content file
- [ ] Update to existing content
- [ ] Structural or navigation change
- [ ] Correction / bug fix
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Other

---

## Checklist

**Content**
- [ ] Content uses the appropriate template from `_templates/`
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete (title, section, topic, dates, status, tags)
- [ ] Status is set to `draft` or `review` — not `published` unless fully complete
- [ ] All factual claims are verifiable and sources are listed
- [ ] No placeholder text remains in the file

**Formatting**
- [ ] File uses `kebab-case.md` naming
- [ ] File is in the correct directory
- [ ] Code blocks have language identifiers
- [ ] Headings do not skip levels

**Navigation**
- [ ] Parent directory `README.md` index is updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has a brief entry for this addition

**Quality**
- [ ] Content follows the [Style Guide](../docs/style-guide.md)
- [ ] Content explains *why*, not just *what*
- [ ] No content copied from external sources without attribution

---

## Related issues

*Closes #[issue number] if applicable*
